calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to Open Court, Defendant in Pro Per Tom Kim appears in the courtroom. Korean interpreter Ted Kim (via Zoom) assists Mr. Kim. Mr. Kim states he has a hearing, is not really aware of what is happening and would like to speak with the Judge. The clerk states the court did not receive any notice to contest and there is no appearance by the other side.
At the instruction of the court, the clerk informs Mr. Kim there will be no hearing and the court adopts the tentative ruling. The clerk hands Mr. Kim the flyer re the Access Center. Both Defendant and Interpreter are released at 9:17am.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff properly served Requests for Admission and Defendant Tom Kim did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's requests. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiff's RFAs, Set One, served May 28, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Counsel for the Plaintiff/prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
